lower_tail_definition.scene_weighted: frac_i( a_i^2 * lam_JB,i < 9 ), a_i^2=scene proj energy on J_B eigenmode i (== 1 - f_rec, map convention)
lower_tail_definition.unweighted: frac_i( (||beta||^2/d) * lam_JB,i < 9 ), flat energy-spread per mode

frec_vs_lowertail_scene_identity.note: scene-weighted lower-tail mass == 1 - f_rec by construction (map convention); reported as an identity/consistency check, not an independent collapse

control_frec_vs_trace.note: estimation should NOT collapse on the trace

control_Tdet_avg_vs_lammin.note: energy-spread detection should NOT read the worst mode

dual_Tdet_worst_vs_lammin.note: worst-mode detection DOES read the lower tail
